reviews.comment:
Todo excelente,muy buena atención, muy bien cuidado los sanitarios,el personal muy amable, excelente ubicación, ideal para los viajeros. El Full muy completo. YPF lo más

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent, very good service, the restrooms were very well maintained, the staff was very friendly, and the location was excellent, ideal for travelers. The full package was very complete. YPF is the best.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su comentario. Lo esperamos nuevamente!

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicios a mitad de camino Sgo- Córdoba. Bien organizado, baños limpios, se puede consumir en el bar, o bien para llevar. Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
A service station halfway between Santiago and Córdoba. Well-organized, clean restrooms, you can eat in the bar or get takeaway. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay que esperar para cargar nafta  son muy lentos y los baños estaban muy sucios no había ni papel ni jabón es la primera vez que están así

(Translated by Google)
You always have to wait to get gas, they're very slow, and the bathrooms were very dirty; there was neither toilet paper nor soap. It's the first time they've been like this.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo a Córdoba y cuando estoy de regreso paro a comer  unos de los mejores sandwiches de milanesas.
Si hace falta cargo combustible.  Baños limpios, amplios. Buen lugar para un descanso cuando se está de viaje por esas rutas.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel to Córdoba and on my way back, I stop to eat one of the best milanesa sandwiches. I also fill up with gas if needed. The restrooms are clean and spacious. It's a good place to rest while traveling on those roads.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUd1pDS0dBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para pasar a desayunar , almorzar, merendar , cenar....
Los empleados son muy agradables y atentos...
Los dormís un lujo excelente lugar un 10 👌🏻

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop for breakfast, lunch, afternoon tea, dinner... The staff are very friendly and attentive... The bedrooms are luxurious, an excellent place, a 10/10 👌🏻
